shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form deepEqual circular shared object structural equality" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"deepEqual|deep equal\" src test* __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -100 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,120p' package.json"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isObject.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isPrimitive.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isPlainObject.ts; rg -n \"deepEqual\\(["'^'"\\n]*,\" src --glob '*.ts' --glob '*.tsx' | head -40"

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes"
printf '"'%s\\n' '# Pairwise cycle tracking for deep equality' '' 'Recursive structural equality guards should track operand pairs rather than each operand independently. A shared reference can be compared with different counterparts in separate branches, so marking either side as visited makes equality sticky and hides real differences; pairwise tracking still terminates genuinely cyclic comparisons.' > \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes/deep-equal-pairwise-cycle-tracking.md"
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
